target:
I'm sorry, I'm sorry!!
I didn't mean to…!!

(He's angry…?
That's only natural.
I need to clear up the misunderstanding fast!)

Ah, um!
It wasn't on purpose——

You were having a bad dream…
Did you have a nightmare?

(What's going on…?
This person was shot…and there are two Mios…)

(Then what happened?
Why am I on the ferry…)

Being shot with a gun…
Have you ever experienced that?

(This is bad!
I'm acting really suspicious!
If I keep this up, I might get reported…)

(I'm glad I wasn't reported…
I really did something bad.)

(I got slapped by that person…
It's not the first time?)

(No, that's not possible.
What am I thinking?)

(Still, my cheek is throbbing.
Slapping really hurts…
My cheek might be swollen…)

(I don't have a mirror.
Let me check with my phone camera.)

…Excuse me, sorry.
Can I ask something?
Um… Today's date is July 23rd, right…?

No… I think it's the 22nd.
Did I get it wrong…?

I'm sorry, I was mistaken!
Excuse me…!

(On the 23rd, I heard about Ushio's shadow from Mio,
then went to Lady Hiruko…)

(There were two Mios, and one killed the other,
maybe I was shot with a pistol…)

(If I think about it, it's obvious.
Such things don't exist in reality.)

(By the way, last night…
I fell asleep reading that…)
(Family and friends being replaced by identical copies…)

(A horror mystery with a girl obsessed with such delusions,
set in Wakayama City)
(I must have had a bad dream for reading such a thing…)
(I guess I'm really shaken up about the Ushio incident…)
(Because of that weird dream, I almost ended my life…)

(Calm down, calm down…
When things like this happen, look at yourself from a <color=#GF_TIPS_062>bird's-eye view</color> to calm down…)

(It's just because of the sudden phone call and lack of sleep…
Take a deep breath and calm down…)

(By the way, getting slapped…
It's my first time…)
We will soon arrive at Hitogashima Island.

(Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture,
the island of 'Hitogashima' floating in the Kii Channel.
The island in the background is Awaji Island)
(I'm returning to this hometown after two years――)

(――To attend the funeral of my childhood friend,
Ushio Kofune)
